Member.title: Member
Member.description: A congregation member tracking their Bible reading progress

id.description: User ID matching their Auth UID

chaptersRead.description: Total chapters read across all books

bookProgress.description: Map of book IDs to chapters read in that book

Reflection.title: Reflection
Reflection.description: A thought or reflection shared by a member about their Bible reading

authorName.description: Name of the person who shared it

memberId.description: ID of the specific member profile this reflection is about (optional)

Reminder.title: Reminder
Reminder.description: A daily announcement or scripture reminder broadcasted by the pastor/admin

text.description: The custom broadcast text or verse

senderName.description: The name of the admin who sent the reminder (e.g. Pastor David)

/members/{memberId}.description: Public profiles of members with their progress
